channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 11, 07:00 - 10:10 UTC

Jul 3, 07:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in racks G124B07, G124B14, G124B19, G124B21, G125B02, G125B03, G125B18, G125B21 and G125B22.

Start time : 11/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 11/08/2026 10:10 UTC

List of concerned racks:
- Rack G124B07
- Rack G124B14
- Rack G124B19
- Rack G124B21
- Rack G125B02
- Rack G125B03
- Rack G125B18
- Rack G125B21
- Rack G125B22

Service impact : Public networks will be temporarily unavailable for 30 seconds during the maintenance for servers located in the specified racks.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 06:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L115B06 maintenance notification

THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 22, 07:00 - 08:00 UTC

Jun 23, 17:43 UTC

Start time : 22/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 08:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, servers in the rack L115B06 will be temporarily unavailable.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G233B07 Migration Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 04:00 - 06:00 UTC

Jul 2, 14:27 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a migration from rack G233B07 to G233B08.

Start time : 16/07/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in rack G233B07 will be unavailable during maintenance for 2 hours.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a migration on our infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [YYZ][Dedicated Servers] - Room YYZ0101 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 12:30 - 13:30 UTC

Jun 22, 16:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack YYZ0101B02A
- Rack YYZ0101B02A


Start time : 08/07/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 13:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R805R01 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 4, 11:15 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in Rack R805R01.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/07/2026 11:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in Rack R805R01 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [SBG3][Storage and Backups] - File Storage Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 4, 07:22 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on our Storage offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/07/2026 06:11 UTC
End time : 04/07/2026 06:37 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The File storage service was temporarily unavailable for some customers in SBG3 region.
Customers Impact : Some customers encountered difficulties accessing their file storage.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 45F10 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 4, 06:49 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 04/07/2026 03:58 UTC
End time : 04/07/2026 06:47 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 4, 04:16 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : A significant number of servers are now operational.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 4, 04:08 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack 45F10.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/07/2026 03:58 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack 45F10 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 3, 18:57 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 03/07/2026 12:55 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 18:20 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 3, 13:46 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Virtual Private Servers offer in the GRA Region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/07/2026 12:55 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers are temporarily unavailable in the GRA Region.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their Virtual Private Servers in the specified region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [LIM3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack LIM0313A03B Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 3, 18:26 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 03/07/2026 15:22 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 15:50 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 3, 16:06 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 03/07/2026 15:50 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/07/2026 15:22 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack were no longer able to access the public and vRack networks.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via public and vRack networks located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 3, 15:48 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack LIM0313A03B.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/07/2026 15:22 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the public and vRack networks.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public and vRack networks located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA4][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0406C01A Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 3, 14:18 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 03/07/2026 12:05 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 13:51 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 3, 13:26 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack GRA0406C01A.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/07/2026 12:05 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack GRA0406C01A are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
